---
description: 'Generate SEO meta tags for a MaritimeEdge page. Use when: adding SEO, meta tags, social sharing tags, og tags.'
---

Generate the complete SEO meta tag block for the given MaritimeEdge page.

Requirements:
- `<title>`: Descriptive, includes "MaritimeEdge", under 60 characters
- `<meta name="description">`: 150-160 characters, compelling summary
- `<meta property="og:title">`: Matches or shortens title
- `<meta property="og:description">`: Matches description
- `<meta property="og:image">`: Unsplash image URL if applicable

Output only the meta tags ready to paste into `<head>`.
